reasons: Recent price momentum has supported an upward session move.
A high-materiality disclosure has entered the recent flow and is drawing attention.
Recent disclosure tone skews positive, offering near-term sentiment support.
risks: A surprise filing could quickly alter the short-term picture.
A sector-wide move could upend the current near-term setup.
short_term.what_would_change_view: A material new filing or a sector-wide rotation that breaks the current trend.

reasons: Stability and dividend signals are meaningfully intact relative to other factors.
Fundamentals are mixed with no single pillar outstanding, avoiding a decisive long-term tilt.
The underlying business model provides recurring revenue visibility over time.
risks: The growth signal remains a weak point.
The absence of a standout fundamental pillar limits long-term upside optionality.
Structural headwinds in the toll-road and parking environment could reduce volume or pricing power.
long_term.what_would_change_view: A clear inflection in growth or a deterioration in the stability and dividend quality would shift the neutral-long view.

valuation_note: Without a strong growth catalyst, the stock sits in a neutral valuation zone; it is neither clearly cheap nor rich, and neither horizon offers enough conviction to demand a re-rating.
